title: Best Multispeciality Hospital in Basaveshwara Nagar Bangalore | About Punya Hospitals
description: Punya Hospitals in Basaveshwara Nagar Bangalore offers expert care with experienced doctors including Dr Punyavathi and Dr Nagaraj with 26 years experience in gynecology laparoscopic and general surgery

Dr. Nagaraj Puttaswamy Mrs. Punyavathi's Patient Dr. Punyavathi Google Reviews Read what our patients have to say about their experience with us. 4.8 (2,100+ Reviews) Add Google Review R Ranjith BV 2 reviews 3 months ago I was admitted to Punya Hospital under the care of Dr. Nagaraj B. Puttaswamy, and I'm truly grateful for the excellent treatment I received. With his expertise and guidance, I recovered at the earliest. ... More S Sumanth K 5 reviews 5 months ago Dr. Punyavathi is an amazing doctor. Very patient and listens to all our queries. The hospital staff is very supportive and caring. Highly recommend Punya Hospital for maternity care. ... More A Anusha Reddy 1 review 7 months ago One of the best hospitals in Basaveshwar Nagar. Clean and well-maintained. The doctors are highly experienced. We had a great experience during my father's surgery. ... More V Vikram Gowda 3 reviews 10 months ago Excellent facilities and very professional staff. The trauma center responds very quickly. Highly satisfied with the overall experience at Punya. ... More R Rahul Sharma 4 reviews 1 month ago Very professional doctors and staff. Had a smooth surgery experience with Dr. Nagaraj. Highly recommended for any surgical needs. ... More P Priyanka M 12 reviews 2 months ago Dr. Punyavathi is the best gynecologist. She guided us throughout my pregnancy with such care and patience. The hospital is very clean. ... More K Kiran Kumar 8 reviews 3 months ago Clean and hygienic hospital environment. The nursing staff is very attentive and polite. Overall a good experience for my family. ... More D Deepa S 6 reviews 4 months ago One of the best multispecialty hospitals in Bangalore. Good facilities and very patient care focus. Definitely worth visiting for expert advice. ... More M Mahesh V 9 reviews 6 months ago Had my father's urology treatment here. Dr. Nagaraj is highly experienced and explains everything very clearly. We are very satisfied. ... More S Sowmya G 2 reviews 8 months ago Prompt emergency response. We reached at night and were attended to immediately by the trauma team. Grateful for their quick action. ... More A Arun B 15 reviews 9 months ago Reasonable packages for surgeries compared to other big hospitals. The transparency in the treatment plan and billing was very good. ... More M Megha Rao 5 reviews 11 months ago Excellent post-operative care. The rooms are well-maintained and comfortable for both patient and attender. Very happy with the care. ... More S Suresh N 7 reviews 1 year ago Laparoscopic surgery was done with precision. Recovered quickly as promised by Dr. Nagaraj. The follow-up visits were also handled well. ... More L Latha K 3 reviews 1 year ago Good coordination between departments. The pharmacy and lab services inside the hospital are also very efficient and fast. ... More S Sandhya Murthy 4 reviews 2 weeks ago We visited Punya Hospital for my mother's joint replacement surgery. Dr. Nagaraj and the orthopedic team were exceptional. The care and attention given post-surgery were amazing. Highly recommend! ... More M Manjunath Prasad 3 reviews 1 month ago Very clean hospital with excellent dialysis unit facilities. The staff and nephrologists are very cooperative and professional. Timely service is their biggest strength. ... More S Dr. Sunitha Rao 8 reviews 2 months ago I had an excellent experience with Dr. Punyavathi for gynecological laparoscopic surgery. She explained everything clearly, clearing all my doubts before the procedure. Recovery was very quick. ... More V Vijay Lakshmi 2 reviews 4 months ago Best hospital in Sahakarnagar and Basaveshwar Nagar areas. Emergency department is top-notch. They handled my father's trauma case with extreme speed and care. Highly grateful. ... More K Karthik Raj 6 reviews 6 months ago Highly satisfied with the pediatric and general medicine services. The nurses are very friendly and made my child comfortable during treatment. Good, hygienic environment. ... More S Shweta Kulkarni 1 review 8 months ago Dr. Punyavathi is the most compassionate gynecologist. The maternity package was very reasonable, and the post-delivery care was excellent. Big thanks to the entire team! ... More Our Insurance Partners We provide cashless treatment facilities with all major insurance providers and TPAs.
